description: Create and enable a systemd service named 'veracrypt-media.service' that automatically mounts the encrypted volume '/home/ga/Volumes/media_vault.hc' to '/mnt/media_vault' using the keyfile '/home/ga/Keyfiles/media_server.key'. The volume has no text password (password is empty). The service should start automatically, and you must verify the volume is mounted and data is accessible.
